name: Regenesis Birth
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天地再世</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リジェネシス・バース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl_base: Regenerated World of Heaven and Earth
desc: You can send 1 "Regenesis" monster from your Deck to the GY, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; change it to face-down Defense Position. During your opponent's turn: You can send this card to the GY; Special Summon as many "Regenesis" monsters as possible with different names from your hand, GY, and/or banishment, but send them to the GY during the End Phase. You can only use 1 "Regenesis Birth" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: You can send 1 "Regenesis" monster from your Deck to the GY, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; change it to face-down Defense Position. During your opponent's turn: You can send this card to the GY; Special Summon as many "Regenesis" monsters as possible with different names from your hand, GY, and/or banishment, but send them to the GY during the End Phase. You can only use 1 "Regenesis Birth" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
